codeReview.summary: Commit 3141310f adds local httptest-based Z.AI executor coverage for non-streaming request shape, streaming SSE handling, upstream streaming errors, preserved tools/tool_choice fields, custom outbound headers, Z.AI thinking translation, and local-only token counting. The tests exercise /chat/completions targeting with bearer auth and avoid live upstream calls, matching the feature's validation contract assertions.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, worker skill procedure, shared state files, and commit diff. The implementation satisfies the requested mocked Z.AI executor behavior coverage with no blocking or non-blocking code review issues found.
